title: Cinematic Anime Battle Key Art AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Anime Battle Key Art AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical cinematic anime battle key art for a black-clad long-haired warrior and a white-clad silver-haired warrior in an ancient temple courtyard at night. Subject: a black-clad long-haired warrior and a white-clad silver-haired warrior face off with drawn blades, then meet in a fierce katana collision with bright orange friction sparks at the center of the frame. Scene: an ancient temple courtyard at night is soaked in heavy rain at night, with thunderclouds, wet stone, wind-whipped fabric, and reflective puddles. Composition: Fixed vertical action poster composition with a wide establishing scale, centered clash silhouette, low-angle energy, and orbit-like motion implied by rain streaks and sparks. Style: Cinematic anime style with crisp character detail, consistent clothing and faces, dramatic moonlit backlighting, fiery weapon glow, sharp rain trails, and high-clarity 4K texture. Color Palette: Fixed midnight blue rain shadows, silver moonlight, black and white wardrobe contrast, orange weapon sparks, and cool wet-stone reflections. Lighting: Moonlit backlight, fiery blade glow, crackling spark highlights, and reflective puddle shine against deep night shadows. Signature Elements: glowing blades, metallic impact sparks, and rain droplets split by the strike, rain-split sparks, ancient temple courtyard, opposing black-and-white warriors, and vertical cinematic battle rhythm. Restrictions: Keep faces and clothing consistent, anatomy stable, blade action readable, rain detail crisp, and the frame subtitle-free.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
